Thomas E. Duckworth, Esq., DUCKWORTH & PETERS LLP, (415) 433-0333, tom@duckworthpeters.com for Plaintiff ROBERT K. MILLS.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WEISS BIOSCIENCE, INC.'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

Weiss Biosciences, Inc.'s demurrer is sustained, with leave to amend to plead successor-in-interest allegations.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
